notes:
Drift Protocol on Solana. Edge: Solana ecosystem Twitter, airdrop schedule
determinism, governance vote dates. Hourly bars; 6-48h forward window. Lower fees than
Hyperliquid but tighter liquidity on small caps.

sources_error.hyperliquid:
not_implemented: adapter 'Hyperliquid' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: perpetual futures ticks + funding via https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info (public; rate-limited). source_params['coins'] = list of symbols.
  Implement quant/adapters/hyperliquid.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
sources_error.news_scraper:
not_implemented: adapter 'News scraper' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: generic article scraper used by agent orchestration (Claude/Codex). source_params['urls'] or ['queries']. Outputs (timestamp, text, source_url) rows.
  Implement quant/adapters/news scraper.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
